method: SA(2)-DMRG-CASSCF(6,6), native MPS-Krylov analytic gradients + analytic NAC, dmrg-maxm 200, response-tol 5e-4, no determinant conversion
note: clean reported window; a diagnosed SA-CASSCF solution discontinuity (basin flip) occurs at the step immediately beyond this window (see manuscript/SI).
